_doc: Structure map for the WorldClass schedule sheet. Drives the index-schedule importer so it reads ONLY the relevant tabs/ranges and knows how to interpret them. Update THIS file when the sheet structure changes (not the importer code). Tabs are matched by NAME; tabular columns by HEADER text (not index) so added/moved columns don't break parsing.
spreadsheet_note: ATLAS copy of 'Super excel 25-26'. Production sheet id will differ — pass it in at run time.

tabs.note: Each room = two columns (L&X&V | M&J). Forward-fill room name across the blank paired column.

group_classes.credentials_warning: Row 2 of each tab holds room login email+password. NEVER read/store/expose.

trials.note: Header text is messy (trailing spaces, newlines) — match case-insensitively on normalized contains.

privates.note: schedule_text is free-form Spanish — store raw; optional LLM normalization later.

tutorias.note: A second mirrored block of the same grid sits to the right — read only the first block (cols up to the first VIERNES).

conversation.note: v2: group header cell 'CONV <day> <time>' + enrolled students with daily attendance across a year-wide date grid.

substitutions.note: Parallel room×time grid; subs written inside class cells as parentheticals e.g. 'SERGIO B1.1 (JOAN semana 1.12)'. Best-effort regex extraction: original_teacher from the base cell, substitute = words before 'semana', week_note = the 'semana ...' text. Rooms MON.1-6 = Monumental (split l/x · m/j); skip the 'Antiguo'+credentials row. Date resolution of 'semana X' is NOT done (stored as raw note).

skip_tabs_reason: Course-planning grids, year-long attendance detail, per-teacher private trackers, and misc scratch tabs — not needed for v1 'what's my schedule / trials / privates today'.
